subject: docs(theme): rewrite THEME_DARK_MODE.md for DaisyUI-based approach
body:
The old implementation guide described custom CSS variable semantic tokens
and React hooks that none of the three projects actually use. All three
(glow-props, canva-grid, few-lap) use DaisyUI's theme system instead.

Rewritten from scratch based on actual code across all three projects:
dual-layer theming (.dark + data-theme), per-mode theme persistence,
catalog patterns, validation, flash prevention, cross-tab sync, and
Uniwind for React Native.

Tags: documentation, theme, dark-mode, daisyui, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: docs-organization
Semver: patch
